title: Greatly Spiced Tunisian Almonds Pastry
description: This sweet and savory pastry is a traditional Tunisian dish that is perfect for any occasion. It features the crunch of almonds and the warmth of red pepper flakes, making it a delicious and memorable treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius).
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, granulated sugar, turbinado sugar, and salt.
Add the cold butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender or your fingertips to work it into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add the ice water, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together in a ball.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead a few times until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges of the dough and press it into the corners of the pan.
In a small bowl, mix together the almonds, red pepper flakes, and a pinch of salt.
Spread the almond mixture evenly over the bottom of the tart shell.
Bake the pastry for 25-30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
Allow the pastry to cool completely in the pan before slicing and serving.
